Joann explores how people lived during this time, from the tightly packed houses and villages of the common people, to the clothes they wore and the food they ate.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt: Life and Death in the Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: Egyptologist Dr Joann Fletcher reveals a strange and mysterious world: the ancient Egyptian afterlife. To them waking life was just a dress rehearsal. Joann clambers into rarely visited tombs, explores a treasure trove of long-buried objects and examines spectacular mummies to discover just why the Egyptians spent a fortune preparing for death.

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Mafia and Britain
programme.desc: Visiting a village in Calabria, Ross discovers the true extent of the mafias powers, before meeting the daughter of an Italian mob boss.

programme.title: Greatest Prison Escapes With Billy Hayes
programme.desc: Six inmates smash a rusted toilet through a bathroom wall in six minutes in order to escape on a Christmas night in Tennessee.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Historian Dan Jones is in the heart of Snowdonia exploring a stronghold built not only as an impenetrable fortress but also as a lavish royal palace fit for a fairytale - Caernarfon Castle.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Situated high on a crag overlooking the river Forth, Stirling Castle has guarded the gateway to the Scottish Highlands for centuries. The residence of kings, armies and felons, its battle-scarred walls have witnessed savagery and chivalry, intrigue, alchemy, adultery and murder. Location filming, stunning aerial shots and reconstructions bring to to life its turbulent history.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts explores the English Civil War through the history of Oxford, the city at the heart of a battle between an autocratic king and his rebellious parliament.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice visits Canterbury for the story of Plantagenet England. Canterbury is steeped in history and the era of the Plantagenets - the strong house that held the English throne from 1154 until 1485 - saw the most dramatic episodes in the citys story.

programme.title: Britains Greatest Obsessions
programme.desc: Chris Packham sets out to discover when animals first became our "best friends", and which kind of pets Brits prefer. During his investigation he meets a pet psychic and a real-life pet detective, he then visits a rescue centre for exotic pets.

programme.title: Britains Greatest Obsessions
programme.desc: Lorraine Kelly explains our constant harking back to Winston Churchill and the part played by Britain in the Allied victory.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts travels back to the Ages of Bronze and Iron to discover what kind of a place Britain was before the Romans invaded. With no written history, only archaeology can provide the clues. Alice uncovers a world that is complex, sophisticated and pretty strange. She examines the two Hebridean Bronze Age skeletons known as the Cladh Hallan Mummies.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts goes in search of our elusive Stone Age ancestors. Along the way she visits the Channel island of Jersey where she meets a team of archaeologists hoping to shed new light on the much-maligned Neanderthals, and embarks on a kayak survey of the coastline looking for undiscovered sites hidden in the cliffs. At the Natural history museum Alice sees the dark side of our Ice Age ancestors lives.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Situated high on a crag overlooking the river Forth, Stirling Castle has guarded the gateway to the Scottish Highlands for centuries. The residence of kings, armies and felons, its battle-scarred walls have witnessed savagery and chivalry, intrigue, alchemy, adultery and murder. Location filming, stunning aerial shots and reconstructions bring to to life its turbulent history.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the turbulent history of Carrickfergus, one of the most ancient castles in Northern Ireland and a stronghold that holds the key to understanding the tempestuous relationship between Britain and Ireland.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts tells the story of Roman Britain by studying the history of Chester, Britains most Roman town.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: In York, Professor Alice Roberts takes part in a Viking battle, meets the metal detectorists behind one of the UKs greatest archaeological finds, and gets her hands on Viking poo.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson heads off for a 45-mile walk across Wiltshire to tell the story of life and death in the last centuries of the Stone Age. His route takes him through the greatest concentration of prehistoric sites in Europe.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: It was 30 years after the Romans invaded Britain that they were ready to take on the challenge of conquering the Lake District. Tony Robinson tracks their 50-mile walk from Penrith past Ullswater to Ambleside and on to the Irish Sea at Ravenglass.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Finds include: revelations from `Britains Pompeii, the 3,000-year-old perfectly preserved village in Cambridgeshire, including how Bronze Age ancestors designed their homes, and their kitchens packed with food and equipment, and the theatre where Shakespeare premiered Romeo and Juliet and Henry V.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: Viking Camp And Iron Age Gold
programme.desc: A look at the camp from which Vikings invaded Britain, and groundbreaking evidence that the world-famous Avebury stone circle isnt just a sacred site but a place where people lived and worked. In Staffordshire, the oldest Iron Age gold in Britain is unearthed.

programme.title: Britains Greatest Obsessions
programme.desc: Comedian Reginald D Hunter and Alexei Sayle peel away the thin veneer that disguises Britains enduring class system.

programme.title: Britains Greatest Obsessions
programme.desc: Liza Tarback on Weather: Liza Tarbuck tackles the national obsession with all things weather-related. Season finale.

programme.title: Cracking the Code
programme.desc: Revealing the greatest codes known to humanity and the brilliant minds that manage to solve them.

programme.title: Cracking the Code
programme.desc: Uncover some of the worlds most renowned encryptions, revealing how they were decoded, the minds who cracked them and the secrets they masked.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson sets off on his most curious walk yet, across the ancient and turbulent kingdom of Northumbria. In the seventh century, at the height of the Dark Ages, the rule of Northumbria stretched from Edinburgh to York.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson travels along the wonderful seascapes of the North Norfolk coast and through one of the least developed spots in the country.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A 1930s semi in Hatfield in Hertforshire, a flat in Croydon and a workshop and land in Heanor in Derbyshire are sold at auction. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the owners and hear their plans to make money from their bricks and mortar.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A mum and dad buy a piece of land in Stevenage in Hertfordshire in the hope of developing a pair of houses for their children, a couple who buy a top-floor flat in Motherwell in Scotland want to make a profit on the rent, and two young brothers buy a run-down house in South Normanton.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A bungalow in Langton Green in Kent is given a high-end refurbishment and extension, a father-and-son team cleverly refigure the existing space in a terraced house in Stoke-on-Trent, and two lifelong friends have high hopes for a piece of land they buy behind a house they already own in Northwood in Middlesex.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A 1930s semi in Leamington Spa in Warwickshire, a terraced house in Londons Plumstead and a workshop on the Isle of Sheppey in Kent are all sold under the hammer. Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin hear about the plans for the three properties.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts catches up on ambitious plans to redevelop the site of a former school in Ebbw Vale in Wales, while Dion Dublin talks to a first-time developer planning to extend up and out at a semi in Bloxwich in the West Midlands.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A flat in Sutton in London, a studio apartment in Chatham in Kent and a terraced house in Middlesbrough are all sold under the hammer. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the new owners.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A bungalow in Biggin Hill with huge potential, a centuries-old cottage in a beautiful part of Devon and an end terrace crying out for an upstairs bathroom are all sold under the hammer. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the new owners and hear their plans.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell joins the team, and looks at an old mews house in an historic part of Litchfield in Staffordshire, while Martin Roberts assesses the potential of a bungalow in Hanley in Stoke-on-Trent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell looks at a large terraced house in Dover in Kent with bags of potential. Martin Roberts is in Camborne in Cornwall viewing a house with lots of issues. Dion Dublin meets a couple who bought a flat in Woodford Green in Essex.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell is in Gillingham in Kent meeting a couple embarking on their first renovation development, Martin Roberts talks to a man with ambitious plans for a house in Londons Chingford, and Dion Dublin looks round a semi in Wolverhampton.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell hears development plans for a two-bedroom flat in Godalming in Surrey, Martin Roberts looks at a house in a terrible state of repair in Telford in Shropshire, and Dion Dublin sizes up the work needing to be done at a terraced house in Smethwick in the West Midlands.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A flat with great sea views in Margate in Kent, a bungalow in Whaley Thorns in Nottinghamshire and an end terrace in Longbridge in Birmingham are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A listed building in Brentwood in Essex dating back to the 16th-century is sold under the hammer, along with a flat in Halesowen in Birmingham and an end terrace in Northwood in Stoke-on-Trent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: FIM Superbike World Championship Motorcycle Racing
programme.desc: The 2026 World Superbike Championship continues with the Pirelli Portuguese Round - the 4.592km track at the Autodromo Internacional do Algarve will push the riders to their very limits as they look to get points on the board. The early years of WorldSBK saw the championship visit Portugal on two occasions with four races held at the Estoril track in the 1988 and 1993 seasons.

programme.title: International Friendly Football LIVE
programme.desc: Croatia take on Brazil as part of the Road to 26 series of international friendlies leading into the 2026 FIFA World Cup from the USA. Brazil have won the World Cup more than any other nation, although their last success was in 2002. Croatia have recent good form in the tournament as they reached the semi-finals in 2022, beating Brazil in the quarter-finals to get there, and also reached the final in 2018, losing to France. The match takes place at the Camping World Stadium in Orlando, Florida.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Second to host in the West Country is business consultant Linda who is looking to impress with a pheasant, venison and pastry swans. However, Simon is putting the cat amongst the pigeons with his juvenile behaviour.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On day three in Swindon and Marlborough, Parisienne Saleha is hoping to take top spot in the competition by serving up a vegetarian meal, however it comes with a side of steak tartare. Saleha hopes her menu will win her the cash prize.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the fourth day in Swindon and Marlborough, drama teacher Ben is putting on a Middle Eastern and Asian inspired menu. Expectations are high as his fellow contestants suspect he is a foodie.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Robin is desperate to meet her hunky, long-distance love in person. Nev and Max agree to help her hunt him down, but what they uncover turns out to be much more than Robin bargained for!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Nev and Max try to help Nick determine if the person he kissed during a mysterious blindfolded rendezvous is actually his online love, Jasmine, or someone entirely different altogether.

programme.title: Help! Im in a Secret Relationship!
programme.desc: Johnny slipped into Ariels DMs over a year ago and now theyre engaged; Ariel plays stepmother to Johnnys son, but Johnny wont let her meet the mother of his child and hides her from virtually every aspect of his life.

programme.title: Help! Im in a Secret Relationship!
programme.desc: Tiffany and Matt crushed on each other in high school. Today, 15 years later theyre madly in love but Tiffany feels hidden. When Matt put their sex life on pause the red flags started piling up. But Matt isnt the only one with.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: The FBI Files

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: The prime suspect in a murder is caught robbing a bank before being sentenced to life. His subsequent prison escape leads to a huge FBI manhunt.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A fugitive drug dealer engaged in a shootout with state troopers, wounding two of them, and eluded capture after a high-speed chase. Authorities immediately set up a statewide manhunt, connecting the fugitive to a murder in western Nebraska.

programme.title: Fred and Rose: The West Murders

programme.desc: With the aid of modern technology, revealing the unknown behaviour of some unusual species of shark: lemon sharks and their white-tip reef counterparts. The journey starts off in the turquoise-blue waters of the Grand Bahama Bank.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Izzie Balmer are off and running again and the going is flat. That is because they are in the eastern counties of Lincolnshire, Cambridgeshire and Bedfordshire. Later, Izzie gets her skates on.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On this trip, Izzie and James visit the most easterly town in the country. Izzie potters about in Lowestoft learning about the porcelain trifles manufactured for the 18th century tourist trade while James goes crabbing in Cromer.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team bring three treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. First to arrive at the barn are Judith Holliman and her son James. They have brought a dear old friend - a stuffed owl called Wol. Judith clearly remembers him peeking out of her Christmas stocking when she was just a few years old, and they have been inseparable ever since. He was a gift from her beloved grandmother, who helped to raise her, and Wol is constant reminder of her grandmothers love. But the decades of hugs and kisses have rather worn out Wol, and he could really do with the expert care of bear ladies Amanda and Julie. Musical maestro David Burville welcomes Kathryn Freeman from Hertfordshire. He is excited to get his healing hands on her familys miniature piano, which is now in a sorry state. Kathryn grew up with five older sisters, and this pint-sized piano provided hours of entertainment for them all.

programme.title: The Derbyshire Auction House
programme.desc: Irita Marriott and her team use their expertise to launch Britains newest saleroom. What hidden gems will they find, and will they sell at auction?

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Two women try to find missing parents after half a century apart. Ann found her birth mother over a decade ago, and now wants to locate her birth father, and Amanda is on the trail of her birth mother who gave her up for adoption in the 1960s.

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Paula Stillie has always looked completely different from her white adoptive family in Scotland. Heartbreakingly, as a little girl she covered herself in talcum powder to try and look more like her parents. Lisa Harding grew up in the north east of England with her single mother Moyra, who worked long hours as a hairdresser by day and taxi driver by night. It was a lonely childhood and Lisa always wished for a sister.

Stylish historical epic retelling the fierce battle at Thermopylae in 481BC. The Spartan king, Leonidas, and his tiny army of 300 followers provided inspiration for the whole of Greece as they fought the massed ranks of the Persian army whose commander, King Xerxes, had up to a million warriors at his disposal.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: Snatched from the Green Place of Many Mothers, young Furiosa gets caught in the crossfire of two tyrannical warlords. As the tyrants fight for dominance, Furiosa soon finds herself in a nonstop battle to make her way home.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Journalist Eddie Brock is trying to take down Carlton Drake, the notorious and brilliant founder of the Life Foundation. While investigating one of Drakes experiments, Eddies body merges with the alien Venom -- leaving him with superhuman strength and power. Twisted, dark and fueled by rage, Venom tries to control the new and dangerous abilities that Eddie finds so intoxicating.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: Eddie Brock is still struggling to coexist with the shape-shifting extraterrestrial Venom. When deranged serial killer Cletus Kasady also becomes host to an alien symbiote, Brock and Venom must put aside their differences to stop his reign of terror.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: The evil mummy Imhotep returns to wreak havoc as he resumes his relentless search for power and immortality. To make matters worse, another ancient evil has been unleashed, even more dangerous than Imhotep. Only the heroic Rick OConnell and his intrepid Egyptologist wife stand in the way of these twin terrors as they embark upon a desperate mission to save the world.

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
programme.desc: Spider-Mans identity is revealed to everyone, and he can no longer separate his normal life from his superhero life. When he asks Doctor Strange for help, it forces him to discover what it means to be him.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. With his faithful companion Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott, Indie goes in search of the magical Sankara stone, and uncovers an ancient evil which threatens all who come into contact with it.

programme.title: Terminator Salvation
programme.desc: After the triumph of the machines on Judgement Day and with killer robots hunting down the last vestiges of humanity, resistance fighter John Connor battles back. However, the arrival of a mysterious stranger threatens to tip the balance in favour of the machines.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: A widowed farmer, with a brave but brutal military past, decides not to join up when the British arrive in 1776. However, when his son enlists and is later captured by the enemy, the former soldier must abandon his new-found pacifist principles in order to rescue his oldest child, and forms a regiment of Carolina patriots, whose guerrilla tactics prove pivotal to the US war effort.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: A widowed farmer, with a brave but brutal military past, decides not to join up when the British arrive in 1776. However, when his son enlists and is later captured by the enemy, the former soldier must abandon his new-found pacifist principles in order to rescue his oldest child, and forms a regiment of Carolina patriots, whose guerrilla tactics prove pivotal to the US war effort.

programme.title: Super-Charlie
programme.desc: A young boy attempts to solve an ongoing series of crimes with the help of his super-powered baby brother.

programme.title: Noahs Ark
programme.desc: A pair of mice, Vini and Tom, devise a plan to sneak onto Noahs Ark.

programme.title: Justice League Vs. Bizarro League
programme.desc: Superman, Batman and the rest of the Justice League team up with the Bizarro League to defeat Darkseid.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: The Dark Knight assembles his heroic friends like Green Arrow and Nightwing to stop the Joker and his cronies from unleashing a diabolical computer virus.

programme.title: Wallace and Gromit in The Curse of the Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: The village is being overrun by rabbits and Wallace has a plan to alter their minds so that they will leave the vegetable allotments alone. However, his plan goes awry and the rabbit problem escalates when the villagers discover a monstrous `were-rabbit destroying everything in its sights. Will Wallace and Gromit be able to solve the conundrum before the creature gets shot?

programme.title: Happy Feet
programme.desc: Son of Memphis and Norma, little sweet penguin Mumble has a big problem: he cant sing a single note. In a world where everyone needs a heart song to attract a soul mate, Mumble feels he doesnt belong there. Our hero Mumble is the worst singer in the world, but he can tap dance brilliantly.

programme.title: Happy Feet Two
programme.desc: Mumbles son Erik hasnt yet found his talents, and he goes with his friends to Adelie-land which is ruled by a penguin who can fly. When Erik returns to Emperor-land and finds them trapped under big walls of ice. Will Erik be able to save his family and friends before it is too late?

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: A wildly imaginative seven-year-old boy discovers that his new brother, Boss Baby, is actually a spy on a secret mission, and only he can help thwart a dastardly plot that involves an epic battle between puppies and babies.

programme.title: The Ant Bully
programme.desc: This is the story of a ten-year-old boy named Lucas Nickle, who has just moved to a new neighbourhood, has no friends, and is the target for the local bully and his gang. His parents are leaving for a honeymoon in Puerto Vallarta, so they are too busy to attend to his problems. His sister is distracted by her cellular phone, and the grandmother is obsessed with UFOs and aliens.

programme.title: DC League of Super-Pets
programme.desc: Krypto the Super-Dog and Superman are inseparable best friends, now Krypto must convince a ragtag group of animals to master their own newfound powers to help him save Superman and the rest of the Justice League.

programme.title: Rebellious
programme.desc: A headstrong princess is stolen by an evil sorcerer, and her scholarly fiance must use his wits in an epic quest to find her while she boldly challenges her captors and plots a daring escape.

programme.title: DC Super Hero Girls: Legends of Atlantis
programme.desc: Siren and Mera steal the powerful Book of Legends. The Super Hero Girls head to Atlantis to recover the book before Siren can use it to create an army and take over the entire ocean.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Mechs vs. Mutants
programme.desc: Gotham City faces catastrophe when Mr Freeze transforms Killer Croc and Bane into mega-sized mutant monsters. As the gigantic villains go on the rampage, its up to the caped crusader to cut them down to size.

programme.title: Tom and Jerry: Cowboy Up!
programme.desc: Tom and Jerry are in the Wild West where they help save a ranch from the hands of a greedy villain. The rivals team up to help a cowgirl and her brother save their homestead from a greedy land-grabber.

programme.title: LEGO DC Super Heroes: The Flash
programme.desc: Reverse-Flash manipulates the Speed Force to put The Flash into a time loop, which forces him to re-live the same day over and over again. The Flash must find a way to restore time and finally apprehend his worst enemy before all is lost.

programme.title: LEGO DC Super Heroes: The Flash
programme.desc: Reverse-Flash manipulates the Speed Force to put The Flash into a time loop, which forces him to re-live the same day over and over again. The Flash must find a way to restore time and finally apprehend his worst enemy before all is lost.

programme.title: Scary Girl
programme.desc: To save her father from a dangerous scientist in a world shrouded in darkness, and prevent her planets destruction, a young girl overcomes her fears to travel to a mysterious city of light.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: Billy is the son of hotel chain magnate Brian Madison and expects to inherit the family fortune, but hes shocked when his father stipulates he wont unless he passes 12th grade in just 24 weeks. It will be tough, since he never passed 1st grade. Determined to prove his father wrong, Billy enrols at school.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A footballer is jailed for throwing a crucial game. Whilst inside, the football-loving warden sets him the task of coaching a team of prisoners to take on the all-conquering warders side. Can he form a disparate bunch of prisoners into a winning team?

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: Danny is sour after driving away his girlfriend, and Wheeler is into anything wearing a skirt. The two get into a fight with a trucker and choose community service over a jail term.

programme.title: Team America: World Police
programme.desc: A gung-ho, `Thunderbirds-style squad of puppets lead Americas war on terrorism. The creators of `South Park go on the offensive with an outrageous animated satire that makes a target of everyone from politicians to Hollywood liberals.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: The School of Rock
programme.desc: After guitarist Dewey is kicked out of his own band, he pretends to be a teacher. When he hears the kids play, he realises they could be his support group in the Battle of the Bands, and hell finally get to be the rock star he knows hes destined to be.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: A thirtysomething slacker attempts to inject some stability into his life by adopting an impressionable five-year-old.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: When Pete and Ellie decide to start a family, they stumble into the world of foster care adoption. They hope to take in one small child, but when they meet three siblings, including a rebellious 15-year-old girl, they find themselves speeding from zero to three kids overnight. Now, Pete and Ellie must try to learn the ropes of instant parenthood in the hope of becoming a family.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Irreverent spoof about a black sheriff hired by a crooked speculator to drive citizens out of an all-white town which lies in the path of a railroad. The townspeople turn on the inexperienced sheriff, and he is forced to turn to a convict, once the fastest gun in the West, for help.

programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa .5
programme.desc: Irving Zisman takes his young and impressionable grandson on a cross-country trip in which they encounter male strippers, biker-bar patrons and other unsuspecting citizens.

programme.title: Jackass 3
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and the gang unleash their most insane stunts yet, from roller-skating with a buffalo herd, to playing tennis with a beehive.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: The Shamrock Spitfire
programme.desc: The youngest wing commander in the history of the Royal Air Force, 21-year-old Brendan Spitfire Paddy Finucane became one of the most celebrated fighter aces of the Second World War.

programme.title: Boy Meets Boy
programme.desc: Harry has been partying for 48 hours when he meets Johannes on the dance floor of a club in Berlin. With 15 hours until his flight home, Johannes offers to help him print his boarding pass.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Coach Ken Carter, a controversial high school basketball coach who received national attention when he benched his undefeated team due to their collective poor academic record in 1999. In the face of much criticism, Carter fought to keep his methods, determined to show the boys that they need to rely on more than sports for their futures.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: Cicada
programme.desc: Ben, a young bisexual man, comes out to the world and develops an intense relationship with Sam, a closeted man struggling with deep wounds of his own. As summer progresses and their intimacy grows, secrets from the past come to light.

In the face of much criticism, Carter fought to keep his methods, determined to show the boys that they need to rely on more than sports for their futures.

programme.title: Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: When a perfect night with a perfect stranger ends suddenly the next morning, Charlotte searches for answers and meaning in her life. However, she soon uncovers a shocking secret that changes everything she knows about the man who captured her heart.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a sex worker from Brooklyn, gets her chance at a Cinderella story when she meets and marries the son of an oligarch. Once the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened as the parents set out for New York to get the marriage annulled.

programme.title: Beach Rats
programme.desc: An aimless teen in Brooklyn, NY, spends the summer with his delinquent buddies, a potential new girlfriend and older men that he meets online.

programme.title: Beach Rats
programme.desc: An aimless teen in Brooklyn, NY, spends the summer with his delinquent buddies, a potential new girlfriend and older men that he meets online.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: LEGO DC Comics Super Heroes: Justice League vs. Bizarro League
programme.desc: Superman (Nolan North), Batman (Troy Baker) and the rest of the Justice League team up with the Bizarro League to defeat Darkseid (Frank Welker).

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The plucky penguins join a special inter-species task force in an attempt to stop an evil doctor from taking over the world.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: Barry B Benson is an everybee with a dream. He escapes the hive and makes contact with a human, the florist Vanessa Bloome. Enraged to discover that humans have been stealing their honey goodness, Barry sets out on a crusade that will change the ecosystem forever. Will it be for the better? A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: With the evil wizard Gargamel hot on their trail, Smurfette, Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty embark on a journey through the Forbidden Forest to find a mysterious village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A magic portal transports the little blue people to Manhattan, where they must find a way back to their village before evil wizard Gargamel can find them.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Papa and the rest of the Smurfs reunite with their human friends to rescue Smurfette from the clutches of evil wizard Gargamel.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit and his three sisters -- Flopsy, Mopsy and Cotton-Tail -- enjoy spending their days in Mr. McGregors vegetable garden. When one of McGregors relatives suddenly moves in, hes less than thrilled to discover a family of rabbits in his new home. A battle of wills soon breaks out as the new owner hatches scheme after scheme to get rid of Peter -- a resourceful rabbit who proves to be a worthy and wily opponent.

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Charlie Bucket comes from a poor family, and spends most of his time dreaming about the chocolate that he loves but usually cant afford. Things change when Willy Wonka, head of the very popular Wonka Chocolate empire, announces a contest in which five gold tickets have been hidden in chocolate bars. Charlie is one of the five kids who finds a lucky ticket and goes on a tour of Wonkas chocolate factory.

programme.title: Lemony Snickets A Series of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: Three orphans are sent to live with their uncle Count Olaf, but he only wants their family fortune. What follows is a battle of wits.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: Paul Blart desperately wants to become a cop, but he is too fat to pass the physical exam. He instead works as a security guard in a shopping mall. One day criminals put the mall under siege, and Blart takes it upon himself to save the day.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: Humorous adaptation of the classic Dr Seuss childrens book, in which two housebound children are visited by a cat who saves them from their rainy-day boredom by bringing mayhem to their house.

programme.title: Spy Kids
programme.desc: Two siblings set out on a mission to rescue their ex-spy parents. Summoned back to work from their uneventful lives, the adults run into trouble while on duty. When the children are called upon to help them, they find out about their parents former identities while at the same time developing a greater appreciation for each other.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: The sequel in which the globetrotting sibling duo attempt to reclaim the powerful Transmooker device from the clutches of a mad scientist. Their quest leads them to his tropical island hideaway, which he shares with an assortment of mutant creatures.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: The sequel in which the globetrotting sibling duo attempt to reclaim the powerful Transmooker device from the clutches of a mad scientist. Their quest leads them to his tropical island hideaway, which he shares with an assortment of mutant creatures.

programme.title: Spy Kids 3: Game Over
programme.desc: The Spy Kids set off on their third adventure. Secret Agent Carmen finds herself trapped in a 3-D virtual reality video game designed by their new arch nemesis, the Toymaker. Juni must save his sister, as they battle it out against lifelike 3-D monsters, completing each progressively harder level and ultimately trying to save the youth of the world.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: A group of petty criminals plan to rig a major traffic jam to divert attention from their bank heist.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: Soviet and American forces give chase when the captain of a Soviet nuclear submarine sets a course for the Maine coast.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: Billy is the son of hotel chain magnate Brian Madison and expects to inherit the family fortune, but hes shocked when his father stipulates he wont unless he passes 12th grade in just 24 weeks. It will be tough, since he never passed 1st grade. Determined to prove his father wrong, Billy enrols at school.

programme.title: Logans Run
programme.desc: In 2274, computers rule a hermetically sealed city housing the survivors of a holocaust that has decimated the earth. Life is hedonistic and happy for the citys inhabitants; unfortunately they must be terminated when they reach 30. When Logan 5, a trained hunter for the system, grows intrigued by a beautiful young woman, he is forced to question the fundamental principles of his society and decides he must flee.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Supernatural comedy about three New York parapsychology professors who decide to set up a ghost-catching agency. Soon a storm of malevolent spirits threatens to destroy the city, and the mysterious contents of a womans fridge suggest a paranormal Armageddon.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The phantom-fighters return to the streets of New York when they come to the aid of a woman who fears that her baby is the target of ghostly forces. Four years after Dr Peter Venkman broke up with Dana Barrett, she appeals for help to save her son when an arch-demon trapped in an oil painting wants to take over his body. The old team reunite and trace the source of the trouble to a sinister underground river of slime.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The story of a pair of blues musicians who try to raise the money to save an orphanage by reuniting their old band - nearly writing off Chicago in the process.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: Tale about an unconventional sleuths attempts to find a football teams stolen mascot dolphin. The Miami Dolphins are aghast when their beloved Snowflake is abducted one week before the all-important Super Bowl, so they call in Ace Ventura, a private eye who uses unorthodox methods to retrieve missing animals.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Sequel about the zany private detective who specialises in locating missing pets. Ace Ventura travels to Africa to search for a kidnapped sacred albino bat, which reputedly has the power to restore peace between two warring tribes.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. Theyre led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Franks ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the Oscars ceremony from mad bombers. Anna Nicole Smith provides support in this comic sequel.

programme.title: In and Out

The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: theyve all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

Their quest is complicated after one of them falls in with two inept cops who are determined to show him a good time.

Fiona is eager to show off her new husband, but her parents dont yet know shes an ogre. Taking Donkey along, they set off for Far Far Away to visit them, but the trip is hampered by the jealousy of a wicked fairy godmother and her hired assassin, Puss in Boots.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Shrek is just starting to settle down in his beloved swamp with his wife Fiona, but their mucky bliss doesnt last for long as word arrives that the ogres froggy father-in-law is about to croak. The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

The race is on to free him before Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah are having fun helping their friends, but dont stop first to ask what their friends need. So Lopsiloo finds herself on the wrong side of the bridge, the wrong goods are served in Battersbys shop and Puffertys favourite ball is thrown out when they tidy his kennel. It is only when they take McCogginss scooter away for cleaning that they finally realise the error of their ways.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Madame Au Lait is cleaning the clockhouse so Tommy and Tallulah take their jammy sandwiches to their room to eat. When some jam gets splodged on a blanket, they dont want to upset Madame Au Lait so they clean it themselves, but when they hang it out to dry on Pufferty, it floats off and lands in a muddy puddle! Whatever will Madame Au Lait say.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Chikidee is making slow but steady progress learning to fly, so Tommy and Tallulah try to help by making her a gigantic paper aeroplane. How can they talk her down safely?

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah offer to do the polishing so that Madame Au Lait can make their favourite fruity trifle. The clockhouse is gleaming when Madame Au Lait returns, but when she sets a hoof on the floor she finds that it as slippery as an ice rink.

programme.desc: McCoggins tells the twins not to stray far, but they forget to warn Pufferty when they try to teach him how to play hide and seek. There are not many places in Tickety Town big enough to hide a huge dog train, so Pufferty heads far off into the hills. Where can he be? The race is on to find him by Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah find harvesting very slow when they volunteer to pick Lopsiloos vegetables. Surely there must be some way to speed it up? However, when they hit upon the idea of using Pufferty to pull all the vegetables up at once, they are shocked to find that Puffertys carriages unhook and run amok through Tickety Town.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The twins are asked to deliver a precious package to Madame Au Lait and decide that a ride with Pufferty is safest way to transport it. However, when Hopparoo challenges the lovable dog train to a race, the package bounces out of the carriage and embarks upon a crazy journey round Tickety Town, with Tommy and Tallulah in hot pursuit.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tickety Town is covered in fallen leaves, so Tommy and Tallulah are using McCogginss new prototype street sweeper to clear them. However, in their eagerness to speed things up, they go against his instructions and press the turbo button. Suddenly, the sweeper goes haywire, rampaging through town and sucking up anything in its path, including Madame Au Laits clock key and very nearly Hopparoo too.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The whole town gathers to take part in McCoggins treasure hunt. Whoever finds the most cogs will be the winner. Knowing that McCoggins hides the cogs in the same places every year, Tommy and Tallulah are cruising to victory, until they realise that a quick win will spoil everyones day, but when they borrow McCoggins special clockwork rollerskates to put the cogs back, the skates zoom out of control.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Tobys New House

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Jamie the Littlest Puffin

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane

programme.title: Look at Life
programme.desc: A thoughtful look at the increasing popularity of the countryside and the visitors who spoil it, with a reminder on the need for co-operation in the conservation of the countryside.

programme.title: Target: The Corruptors
programme.desc: Investigative reporters Paul Marino and Jack Flood investigate various cases of industrial corruption.

programme.title: 60s Non-Stop
programme.desc: Featuring a compilation of non-stop music from the 1960s.

programme.title: Football Heroes
programme.desc: We profile one of the games most prolific goal scorers: Ronaldinho nicknamed The Phenomenon in this retrospective from 2009.

programme.title: The Concise History of WWI
programme.desc: Archive footage documents the "War to end all Wars."

programme.title: The Hotel
programme.desc: Nadine and Christian are at the tail end of a two-month trial separation. Theyve come to the Damson Dene with their teenage children Beth and Luke and cocker spaniel Cassie in a last-ditch attempt to save their marriage and re-bond as a family. Meanwhile, Bob and Jeanie from Scotland have come to the Lake District in search of peace and solitude and to celebrate their 50th wedding anniversary.

programme.title: The Concise History of WWII
programme.desc: From Germanys dramatic invasion of Poland, France, and Russia, to the Battle of Britain, the key battles in Africa, and onto the attack of Pearl Harbour and the eventual defeat of the Nazi army in Stalingrad. This programme focuses on all the major events of this period, and also pays particular attention to the wars final year and the gradual destruction of the German army.

programme.title: WW2: The Road to Berlin
programme.desc: The Battle of Stalingrad was the bloodiest and most destructive battle of the Second World War, taking countless lives, and obliterating an ideologically and industrially important Soviet city. E1.

programme.title: British Battles of WWII
programme.desc: Exploring all the major battles of the Second World War, from the early defeats in Norway and France to the military successes at El Alamein and Tunisia, and the ultimate surrender of the Nazis.

programme.title: Battleplan
programme.desc: The German attempt to blockade Britain during World War II was the longest-running campaign of the war, and offered Hitler his best chance of winning. Also a look at the US submarine campaign against Japan in 1943-45.

programme.title: Great Raids of World War II
programme.desc: As soon as RAF Bomber Command struck back at Nazi Germany, it began to suffer unsustainable losses. A team of British paratroopers was sent to Bruneval to seize a radar system and its precious wavelengths in order to drastically reduce the losses suffered. This documentary explores the raid with the use of veterans accounts, archive film, and reconstructions.

programme.title: Where Were You?
programme.desc: An eight-year reign of terror, torture and murder began in January 1971 in Uganda, when Idi Amin took control of the country via military coup.

programme.title: The History Of Naval Aviation
programme.desc: Explore the overlap between naval crafts and aircraft in a number of wars and how aircraft carriers played a pivotal role by bridging the mobility of planes with the buoyant fortresses of the sea.

programme.title: Hitlers Bodyguard
programme.desc: Bullet proof and bomb proof, Hitlers Mercedes cars were almost unstoppable.

programme.title: Dreadnought Destruction: Sinking the German Battle Fleet
programme.desc: German High Seas Fleet Admiral Ludwig von Reuter orders the sinking of his entire fleet in Orkney, Scotland, as the Treaty of Versailles is under negotiation.

programme.title: When the Boat Comes In
programme.sub-title: Some Bulbs to Keep the Garden Bright
programme.desc: Les wants Jacks help in exposing a local scandal.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: One of Arthurs money-making schemes goes wrong and The Winchester Club is faced with closure.

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: An informant in the smuggling ring poses a serious threat to all, and George buys Ross debt to finally crush him. Meanwhile, Caroline returns to Cornwall to make an announcement, but it is Elizabeth who reveals a great secret.

programme.title: Life on Mars
programme.desc: A spate of armed robberies lead the CID unit to prison, to escort notorious safe cracker Dickie Fingers for interview back at the station. However, as they transport him they are set upon by a dangerous gang determined to get their hands on Fingers.

programme.title: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: Alfs joy at Ritas pending divorce is short lived when he learns she is planning to go and live with the new doctor.

programme.title: Lindbergh Baby Mystery
programme.desc: After Lindberghs fame, his baby was kidnapped in 1932. Carpenter Hauptmann was executed, but mysteries remain. Narrated by Robert Powell.

programme.title: Secrets of WW2
programme.desc: From the embarrassment of surrender, the French Resistance developed over the course of WWII into an effective and brave fighting force. They played a key role in the liberation of France.

programme.title: Gladiators of World War II
programme.desc: Elite combat units from the Second World War. The formidable Waffen-SS were renowned for their brutality and tenacity, characteristics which made them the subject of numerous Allied war crime investigations.

programme.title: Plane Resurrection
programme.desc: The series takes viewers into the cockpits of the worlds greatest restored fighting aircraft, and into the astonishing lives of the modern day heroes who are dedicating themselves to bringing these engineering masterpieces back to life.

programme.title: The Concise History of WWII
programme.desc: A look at the liberation of the concentration camps and the arrests and trials of the surviving Nazi leaders for war crimes. The end of the Second World War.

programme.title: Battlefield
programme.desc: Tim Piggott-Smith narrates the story of the Soviet victory over the mighty Japanese Kwangtung Army in the mountains of Manchuria, which is one of the least known of the second World War.

programme.title: Battleplan
programme.desc: This time looking at three different sieges: The first is the German siege of Leningrad from 1941-43, which Hitler simply wanted to starve into surrender, the second is the Viet Minh victory at Dien Bien Phu in 1953 and finally, the Viet Cong siege of the US base at Khe Sanh in 1968, when US commanders drew their enemy into an exhausting confrontation.

programme.title: Naval Aviation in WW2
programme.desc: A look at the role of naval crafts and aircraft in WW2 with eyewitness accounts about how campaigns were planned and what happened on the day of attack when protection from the enemy was very limited.

programme.title: 21st Century War Machines
programme.sub-title: Heavy Metal: Tank vs. Anti Tank
programme.desc: 20th century warfare has the battle tanks tread marks all over it, but it might not translate to the 21st Century too well. Its effectiveness, cost, and differences to the modern battle tank is examined.

programme.title: Desert Generals
programme.desc: This is the story of the forgotten Battle for Egypt and the inside picture of the tactics that stopped the German tanks in their tracks.

programme.title: Wrecks That Changed the World
programme.desc: Uncovering the gripping stories behind the most fascinating wrecks in the worlds oceans.

programme.desc: Investigating a death at a Shakespeare-for-hire agency, Frank and Lu discover more backstabbing and tragedy behind the scenes than there is in the performances.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey invites an old schoolfriend to stay in the guest room and they relive their past adventures. Sharon feels deserted and is convinced that Tracey doesnt want her around any more.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: The boys decide they need a car to transport them on their adventures.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: The gang have some fun with a new camera, tracking down interesting things to photograph. Not Nora Battys wrinkled stockings, surely?

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: There are problems with a bicycle and Compos rabbits foot. Sid tries to avoid Ivy, and who can blame him?

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.sub-title: An Appetite for Murder: Part One
programme.desc: When a popular but tempestuous celebrity chef is murdered during his cookbook launch, theres no shortage of suspects for Judith, Suzie and Becks.

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.sub-title: An Appetite for Murder: Part Two
programme.desc: As police investigate the chefs death, a new development makes them rethink everything they have learned so far. Guest starring Susan Lynch.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The chance discovery of a camera and rolls of film hidden in a pub toilet leads the team to reopen the case of a young man murdered whilst working in a photography shop. The films contain some suspicious photographs and it seems possible that the motive for murder was linked to this, but it becomes apparent that the solution has more to do with the DNA found on the camera.

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Lynley and Havers are called to Smithfields market where the body of a man has been found frozen on a meat truck. It appears that the victim was an illegal immigrant but was it an accidental death?

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharons husband, Chris, wants to dump her for another woman and take the cafe away from her. Meanwhile, Dorien is leaving her husband and everything she owns for the youthful charms of lusty Luke.

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: PC Rickman becomes increasingly friendly with a drug user and soon comes under suspicion of using drugs herself.

programme.title: Classic Doctors
programme.desc: An ex-girlfriend of Nicks turns up at the Mill, eager to turn the clock back. Vivien has a disastrous driving lesson when Eva comes along for the ride.

programme.title: Classic Doctors

programme.title: Classic Holby City
programme.desc: Diane brings Jack to work with her and is warned that she must choose between motherhood and her career. Mubbs tries to make amends with Rosie.

programme.title: Classic Casualty
programme.desc: Kirsty makes an important decision about her future after Warren is admitted to the ED. Yuki helps Lenny in his desperate search to find a donor match for his sister.

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: PC Rickman becomes increasingly friendly with a drug user and soon comes under suspicion of using drugs herself.

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Billie is determined to serve his country, but furious Carol has other ideas. Syed and Amiras windfall moves them away from Zainab, and Leon shows Zsa Zsa his romantic side.

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Billie will not be budged on his plans to fight for Britain. Meanwhile, Amira unwittingly torments Zainab, and Danny plays Ronnie and Roxy off against each other.

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: Having just returned from a two week holiday in Scotland, James has trouble re-adjusting to work. On his first day back, he does his rounds in shorts, much to the amusement of local farmers.

programme.title: Howards Way
programme.desc: Jan has a confrontation with Ken over his plans to buy into her fashion business. Meanwhile, Charles and Gerald prepare for their trial.

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: The case of a missing manuscript takes a dramatic turn when Frank and Lu find themselves trapped in famous author Greg Albans house, where no-one is who they seem.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Darryl has been taken to hospital with appendicitis and plans to escape and spend the night with his wife. Meanwhile, Sharon sees this as an opportunity to do some entertaining of her own.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Clegg and Blamire try to convince Compo to go church, while they talk about the existence of miracles, God, and the possibility of an afterlife.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: The trio pay a visit to a stately home, but of course Compos messy ways create problems.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Spring is here at last, and with comes Compos spring fever. To find perfect companionship, he ends up hiring a female housekeeper.

programme.title: Death in Holy Orders
programme.desc: Cerebral police detective Adam Dalgliesh investigates a death at a theological college where he spent happy times as a youth.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: When Brians dog finds a body on a common, it prompts two people to confess to murder, but when the body turns out to be over 600-years-old, Sandra, Jack, Brian and Gerry are left with the puzzle of whether the confessions are to real murders and if so, where the bodies are.

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Lynley and Havers investigate the murder of a doorkeeper at the House of Lords. When a clerk at the House is also killed events seem to point to a conspiracy involving stolen documents. Havers traces the documents - a test report on a missile system - but they soon realise that she and Lynley are being followed.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Shepherd heads out to investigate the mysterious and unfortunate case of a resident being bludgeoned to death by an unknown blunt weapon in a remote community of beaches at Pateke Point.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Grime artist and self-taught chef Big Zuu takes his food truck to Croydon to meet with Jimmy Carr and cook his ultimate meal ready for when he steps off stage.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu and the boys are back on the road heading to Cardiff to cook for American stand-up and actor Desiree Burch. Shes in the Welsh capital with her new show Desirees Coming Early.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Zuu ventures into the unknown - travelling from his native West London, all the way to Hackney in East London to cook for comedian Jamali Maddix.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu and the boys are going international flying all the way to the Isle of Man to cook for comedian Josh Widdicombe on his Bit Much tour.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu is in Londons West End, Soho, to cook for the comedian London Hughes. London has high standards, so Zuu will have to be on the top of his game!

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Jacob Anderson has asked Zuu to cook him a special meal while he performs at Londons Indigo at the O2 venue.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Zuu, Tubsey and Hyder cook for Rose Matafeo, who wants the boys to cook her a post work-out feast.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Mo Gilligan is preparing to try out some new material at a South London venue so Zuu pulls out out all the stops to provide him with the ultimate post-gig meal.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Grime star and chef Big Zuu returns to his West London roots to meet with comedian and presenter Mel Giedroyc.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu meets American actor and comedian Rob Delaney and agrees to cook him a bespoke meal that combines all his favourite foods.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu meets comic actor Natasia Demetriou at an allotment in West London she discusses all her favourite foods and asks Zuu to come up with her perfect meal.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: King of chat Jonathan Ross is invited to be a guest on Big Zuus very own studio chat show in the manor and receives a dining experience that hell never forget.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu and the boys welcome comedian Roisin Conaty - inspired by her love of cinema snacks, she is treated to a private screening where the food is the star of the show.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Zuu pulls off an epic cook as he welcomes Sir Mo Farah, who takes the boys on in the Mandem Olympics and is treated to a supersized dining experience as his reward.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Zuu and the boys welcome comedian Ellie Taylor to Mandem HQ and give her a BandB-style breakfast buffet with a Peking duck twist - its a dish she wont forget in a hurry...

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Rapper Aitch is heading to the Big Eats manor - to make him feel at home, Zuu puts on a Manchester-themed Big Eat and serves up a few surprises with some unexpected guests.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: The grime artist and self-taught chef hits the road to cook up dishes in the back of his very own food truck for some of the UKs favourite comedians.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Australian comedian, writer and actor Sarah Kendall joins the boys for a Croatian rooftop meal, but the encroaching British weather seems intent on ruining their plans.

programme.title: Big Zuus Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu and the boys welcome comedian Nabil Abdulrashid to the manor - Nabil was banned from eating sweets as a child, so hes in for a trio of treats in the Big Eat.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics have their hands full with a high-speed motorcycle crash, a woman with abdominal pain and an old lady who has fallen, injuring her face.

programme.desc: May 31, 2002, Charlotte Murray Pace, an LSU graduate, is found raped and stabbed to death in her home. The brutality of the crime scene reminded police of the unsolved case of Gina Wilson Green from 2001, who was murdered in a similar way.

programme.title: Butchers of the Bayou
programme.desc: The investigation focuses on a white man with a white pick-up truck. March 1994, Ann Bryan is found murdered in her home at St James retirement centre. Despite attempts to catch her killer, her case goes cold.

programme.desc: Accused of defrauding an elderly person, Tonika has been struggling to cope in jail. She wants her husband to bail her out, but after two weeks behind bars, its the women in her anger management class who are helping her most.

programme.title: Prison Girls
programme.desc: Linda is already planning her next big heist, stealing the ingredients for a celebratory feast when she gets out. But when jail life becomes depressingly familiar, she is forced to accept that confronting her demons may be the only way out.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The start of the new school term leads of a spate of stabbings and a forester is badly injured in an accident involving a chainsaw deep in woods near Keighley.

programme.title: Annika
programme.desc: On her first day in the new role, Annika (Nicola Walker) and the team are called in to solve the murder of a man found in the Clyde, a harpoon piercing his head.

programme.title: Annika
programme.desc: When a body is found on a boat in the Clyde, the case takes the team to the Isle of Bute. Evidence points to a jilted lover, but as the team investigate, a darker secret starts to emerge.

programme.title: Tortured to Death: Murdering the Nanny
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Sophie Lionnet, a nanny whose burned body was found in the garden of her employers South London home.

programme.title: Katie Piper: Locked Up in Louisiana
programme.desc: Katie meets Tonica, who is accused of killing her husband, and learns that she suffered a lifetime of abuse both as a child and then at the hands of her husband.

programme.title: The Gentle Art of Swedish Death Cleaning
programme.desc: The Death Cleaners help Suzi, a sassy 75-year-old woman surrounded by phallic souvenirs from her travels and a lifetime of photos from her years as a singing waitress, let go of the past and remind her that shes not dead yet.

programme.title: Deepfake Porn: You Could Be Next
programme.desc: Most people think of deepfakes as manipulated video clips of world leaders, designed to create confusion, but the most pressing threat of deepfakes is not politics, but porn. Research shows around 96 per cent of deepfake videos are pornographic, with almost 100 per cent of them involving non-consenting women. The film features three women who have been impacted by this form of image-based sexual abuse.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Beginning in Canterbury in Kent, Michael treads the boards as he uncovers the political message behind a play, published in 1936, inspired by the 12th century murder of Archbishop Thomas a Becket. In Maidstone, he learns of the international origins of the most British symbol of remembrance before paying his respects at a war memorial based on Londons Cenotaph.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Following his 1936 Bradshaws guidebook, Michael Portillo explores the east of England, in London and Essex, en route to Lincolnshire.On this leg, he alights at Limehouse in East London for Cable Street, which became the focus of Britains fight against fascism in the 1930s. Heading east, he arrives in Dagenham, the location of one of Henry Fords first car factories in the UK.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos railway journey through 1930s Britain from Canterbury to Skegness reaches Witham in Essex. Here he visits the factory of the worlds oldest supplier of metal framed windows which became popular in the thirties.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Stopping at Saxmundham in Suffolk, Michael heads for Snape Maltings, a concert and arts venue, and learns how the music and life of one of Britains greatest composers was shaped by the sea and his Suffolk surroundings. Striking north, Michaels next stop is the Norfolk seaside resort of Great Yarmouth.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Austin Healeys are classic British vehicles that are difficult to tame. Paul and Charlie have the rare chance to pick up a trio of these iconic cars in varying conditions.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave collects a Ford Fiesta XR2i thats not moved from a garage for twenty-one years and Derek picks up a 1956 Siva Tourer, made famous in Doctor Who.

programme.title: Ghosts of Alderney: Hitlers Island Slaves
programme.desc: Documentary on the artist Piers Secundas research into the use of slave labour on the British Channel island during World War II.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: New. To improve their bombs, the US Navy turned to the animal world for inspiration. When 270 men vanished into a cloud, witnesses claimed the soldiers had been abducted by aliens.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team return to Portchester Castle in Hampshire on the south coast of England. Mark Smith is stunned to see a Victoria Cross medal, the highest award for bravery in combat, and hears a story of incredible heroism during the First World War - with the staggering valuation of the humble bronze medal leaving its owners lost for words.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to the stunning grounds of the Royal Botanic Garden Edinburgh. Art expert Charlotte Riordan is excited to find that two striking paintings of three dimensional raindrops by celebrated Korean artist Kim Tschang-Yeul have turned up at the venue, and the valuation comes as a shock to the owners.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team snap up a slightly saggy Seventies Saab 96, but despite a stunning restoration, could it result in a record financial loss when it goes to auction?

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team purchase a 1950s Austin Westminster rally car in the hope that seasoned competitor Dave Mathewson can win a race.

In Maidstone, he learns of the international origins of the most British symbol of remembrance before paying his respects at a war memorial based on Londons Cenotaph.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Following his 1936 Bradshaws guidebook, Michael Portillo explores the east of England, in London and Essex, en route to Lincolnshire.On this leg, he alights at Limehouse in East London for Cable Street, which became the focus of Britains fight against fascism in the 1930s. Heading east, he arrives in Dagenham, the location of one of Henry Fords first car factories in the UK.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos railway journey through 1930s Britain from Canterbury to Skegness reaches Witham in Essex. Here he visits the factory of the worlds oldest supplier of metal framed windows which became popular in the thirties.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Stopping at Saxmundham in Suffolk, Michael heads for Snape Maltings, a concert and arts venue, and learns how the music and life of one of Britains greatest composers was shaped by the sea and his Suffolk surroundings. Striking north, Michaels next stop is the Norfolk seaside resort of Great Yarmouth.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Austin Healeys are classic British vehicles that are difficult to tame. Paul and Charlie have the rare chance to pick up a trio of these iconic cars in varying conditions.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave collects a Ford Fiesta XR2i thats not moved from a garage for twenty-one years and Derek picks up a 1956 Siva Tourer, made famous in Doctor Who.

programme.title: Ghosts of Alderney: Hitlers Island Slaves
programme.desc: Documentary on the artist Piers Secundas research into the use of slave labour on the British Channel island during World War II.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: New. To improve their bombs, the US Navy turned to the animal world for inspiration. When 270 men vanished into a cloud, witnesses claimed the soldiers had been abducted by aliens.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team return to Portchester Castle in Hampshire on the south coast of England. Mark Smith is stunned to see a Victoria Cross medal, the highest award for bravery in combat, and hears a story of incredible heroism during the First World War - with the staggering valuation of the humble bronze medal leaving its owners lost for words.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to the stunning grounds of the Royal Botanic Garden Edinburgh. Art expert Charlotte Riordan is excited to find that two striking paintings of three dimensional raindrops by celebrated Korean artist Kim Tschang-Yeul have turned up at the venue, and the valuation comes as a shock to the owners.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team snap up a slightly saggy Seventies Saab 96, but despite a stunning restoration, could it result in a record financial loss when it goes to auction?

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo is in East Anglia on the last leg of his rail journey through 1930s Britain. He begins in Attleborough in Norfolk at the headquarters of an international horse welfare organisation which was established in the late 1920s and learns about the charitys pioneering founder. Crossing the Fens, Michaels next stop is the cathedral city of Peterborough.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo strikes out on another series of railway journeys, this time through Britain between the world wars, armed with his 1930s Bradshaws guide. He begins with a tour of the Home Counties and beyond.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his travels through Englands Home Counties at Stoke Mandeville in Buckinghamshire, where he discovers the legacy of a German Jewish doctor who fled the Nazis to settle in Britain.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo heads for leafy Hatch End, where he investigates an illustrator whose work was so popular in the 1920s and 30s that his name entered the English dictionary. William Heath Robinsons great-nephew talks Michael through some of the mad contraptions the artist used to satirise technology.

programme.desc: Crossword puzzles in a national newspaper begin to attract the attention of MI5, as the answers are code words for the upcoming D-Day operation.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to Ham House and gardens in Richmond-upon-Thames. Treasures are in plentiful supply, with miscellaneous expert Bunny Campione valuing an 18th-century effigy and military expert Mark Smith coming across an Indian Order of Merit medal awarded to a Sikh solder in the First World War. Other items include an Omega wristwatch, an 18th-century pistol and a gold necklace from the Alaskan Gold Rush.
